case_title: ODIS HIGHTOWER VS. LEWIS & RIBBS, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF HIGHTOWER, ODIS AS TO DEFENDANT LEWIS & RIBBS, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DAN SCALES FUNERAL SERVICES, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
